name: Balsamic Dressing (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the water, balsamic vinegar, capers, dijon mustard, and dried basil.
2. Add chopped fresh parsley if using.
3. Taste and adjust the amount of vinegar as needed, as it has a strong flavor.
4. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use. Makes about 1 cup.
